aboutSection.whyText: reBrawl is the most popular Brawl Stars private server ever created. It gives players unlimited gems, every brawler fully unlocked at max power, exclusive custom game modes, and cross-region multiplayer — all completely free. With over 500,000 players and an active community that keeps finding new ways to enjoy the game, reBrawl continues to be a player favorite.
aboutSection.archiveText: This is the Official reBrawl Archive — the most trusted and complete source for every reBrawl version. Every reBrawl APK hosted here is the original signed build, virus-scanned and verified with a SHA-256 checksum. We never modify, repack, or tamper with any build. Just clean, verified downloads.
aboutSection.communityText: What makes reBrawl special is the creativity of its community. From custom skins to unique gameplay concepts, players are constantly finding new ways to keep the experience fresh. Our mission is to make sure every version of reBrawl stays available so the community can always come back to the game they love.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked
faq.homeSubtitle: Everything you need to know about reBrawl and the Official reBrawl Archive.

items.question: What is reBrawl?
items.answer: reBrawl is the legendary Brawl Stars private server that gives players unlimited gems, all brawlers fully unlocked from the start, and exclusive custom game modes. This site is the Official reBrawl Archive — the most trusted and complete source for every reBrawl version, ready for the community to download and enjoy.

items.question: Is this the official reBrawl archive?
items.answer: Yes. This is the Official reBrawl Archive. Every reBrawl APK hosted here is the original signed build, verified with a SHA-256 checksum to guarantee authenticity and integrity. We are the most complete and trusted source for reBrawl downloads.

items.question: Is the reBrawl download safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. Every reBrawl APK in our archive is virus-scanned before hosting and verified against its published SHA-256 checksum. We never modify, repack, or tamper with any build. You can independently verify any reBrawl download using the provided checksum.

items.question: How do I install the reBrawl APK on Android?
items.answer: Download the reBrawl APK file, then go to Settings → Security (or Privacy on some devices) and enable 'Install unknown apps' or 'Install from unknown sources' for your browser or file manager. Open the downloaded APK and follow the installer. No Play Store required — it's that simple.

items.question: Do I need root access for reBrawl?
items.answer: No root access required. reBrawl installs as a standard Android application. The process is identical to sideloading any APK — just enable installation from unknown sources and you're good to go.

items.question: What features does reBrawl offer?
items.answer: reBrawl is feature-packed: unlimited gems and coins, every brawler fully maxed and unlocked from the start, exclusive custom game modes not in the official client, cross-region multiplayer, community tournaments, custom map support, and absolutely no pay-to-win mechanics. It's the ultimate Brawl Stars private server experience.

items.question: Which Android version do I need for reBrawl?
items.answer: Requirements vary by version. Most reBrawl builds support Android 5.0 and above. The latest version (v44.0.100) requires Android 6.0 or higher. Each version on the Official reBrawl Archive lists its specific Android requirement so you can find the right fit for your device.

items.question: Is reBrawl affiliated with Supercell?
items.answer: No. reBrawl is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Supercell Oy. Brawl Stars is a trademark of Supercell. The Official reBrawl Archive is maintained independently by the community.

otherVersions.heading: Choose Your reBrawl Edition
otherVersions.subtitle: Each edition offers a unique gameplay experience. Find the one that fits your style.

classic.metaTitle: reBrawl Classic APK Download — Free Archive
classic.description: reBrawl Classic is the community favorite — a pure, unmodified Brawl Stars experience with the freedom of a private server. While reBrawl Mods brings chaotic custom content, Classic keeps it real with original gameplay mechanics, unlimited resources, and every brawler unlocked. If you love Brawl Stars the way Supercell designed it but want everything available from the start, this is the edition for you.

highlights.title: Unlimited Resources
highlights.text: Every account starts with 999,999+ Gems and Gold. No grinding, no purchases — everything unlocked from the moment you jump in.

highlights.title: Original Game Mechanics
highlights.text: No custom-coded brawlers or modified stats. Pure, original Brawl Stars gameplay — exactly how you know and love it.

highlights.title: Skin & Box Testing
highlights.text: The player favorite for opening unlimited boxes and trying out every skin without spending real currency. Some custom brawlers look like they escaped from an alternate Brawl Stars universe — but Classic keeps it clean.

highlights.title: Zero Account Risk
highlights.text: Uses a unique package name (com.rebrawl.classic) so it runs alongside the official game without risking your main account.

highlights.title: No Root Required
highlights.text: Works on standard Android devices. No rooting, no patches — just download and play.

installSteps.title: Preparation
installSteps.text: Make sure no other versions of "LWARB" or "reBrawl" are currently installed on your device.

installSteps.title: Download
installSteps.text: Grab the verified reBrawl Classic v30.231 APK from the download link below.

installSteps.title: Permissions
installSteps.text: Go to Settings → Security and enable "Unknown Sources" to allow the installation.

installSteps.title: Install
installSteps.text: Open the file and tap "Install". If Play Protect flags the app, select "Install Anyway" to proceed.

faq.question: Why am I seeing a "Connecting to Server" error?
faq.answer: The original reBrawl master servers are currently offline. Players typically use community-hosted DNS redirects to connect, or use the app for offline skin and asset viewing. Check the reBrawl community for the latest connection guides.

faq.question: How is reBrawl Classic different from reBrawl Mods?
faq.answer: reBrawl Classic keeps the original Brawl Stars mechanics with no custom-coded brawlers — it's the pure experience. reBrawl Mods goes all-in with 30+ custom brawlers, modified abilities, and exclusive game modes built by the community.

faq.question: Is my device compatible with reBrawl Classic?
faq.answer: reBrawl Classic requires Android 6.0 (Marshmallow) or higher. It runs smoothly on most devices manufactured after 2015. No root access or special hardware needed.

mods.metaTitle: reBrawl Mods APK Download — Free Archive
mods.description: reBrawl Mods is the community's creative playground — the edition where anything goes. With over 30 custom-coded brawlers, modified abilities, and exclusive game modes that never existed in the official Brawl Stars client, reBrawl Mods pushes the boundaries of what a Brawl Stars private server can be. This is custom content at its finest, built by passionate fans for the community.

highlights.title: 30+ Custom Brawlers
highlights.text: Entirely new characters with unique abilities, designed and coded by the reBrawl modding community. Fan-made content you won't find anywhere else in Brawl Stars.

highlights.title: Modified Abilities & Stats
highlights.text: Existing brawlers get overpowered abilities, experimental star powers, and wild stat modifications that create the most chaotic, fun gameplay you've ever experienced.

highlights.title: Exclusive Game Modes
highlights.text: Custom game modes built from scratch — boss rush variants, unlimited ammo arenas, and community-designed map challenges. Creative gameplay at its peak.

highlights.title: Pop-Culture Skins
highlights.text: Iconic character skins from anime, gaming, and pop culture — exclusive skins only available in reBrawl Mods. Enough skins to make your favorite brawler question their identity.

highlights.title: No Root Required
highlights.text: Installs as a standard APK on any Android 6.0+ device. No rooting or advanced setup needed — just download and jump in.

installSteps.title: Preparation
installSteps.text: Uninstall any previous reBrawl Mods builds to avoid version conflicts during installation.

installSteps.title: Download
installSteps.text: Grab the verified reBrawl Mods v30.231-mod APK from the download link below.

installSteps.title: Permissions
installSteps.text: Go to Settings → Security and enable "Unknown Sources" to allow the installation.

installSteps.title: Install
installSteps.text: Open the file and tap "Install". If Play Protect flags the app, select "Install Anyway" to proceed.

faq.question: Are the custom brawlers balanced?
faq.answer: Custom brawlers in reBrawl Mods are intentionally overpowered and experimental. The goal is creative fun, not competitive balance. Expect chaotic, sandbox-style gameplay — that's what makes it a player favorite.

faq.question: Can I play with reBrawl Classic users?
faq.answer: No. reBrawl Mods and reBrawl Classic run on separate servers with different game data. Players on each version can only match with others on the same edition.

faq.question: Why is the reBrawl Mods file size larger than Classic?
faq.answer: reBrawl Mods includes additional assets for 30+ custom brawlers, exclusive skins, and modified game modes — all that custom content adds up, but it's worth it.

legacy.metaTitle: reBrawl Legacy APK Download — Free Archive
legacy.description: reBrawl Legacy is purpose-built for older and budget Android devices. With optimized graphics, reduced asset sizes, and compatibility reaching back to Android 4.3 (KitKat), reBrawl Legacy makes sure every player can enjoy the reBrawl experience regardless of their hardware. No phone left behind — that's what makes this edition a community favorite for players on budget devices.

highlights.title: Ultra-Wide Compatibility
highlights.text: Runs on Android 4.3 (KitKat) and above — bringing reBrawl to devices that can't run the official Brawl Stars client anymore.

highlights.title: Optimized Performance
highlights.text: Streamlined graphics and reduced particle effects deliver smooth, creative gameplay on devices with as little as 1 GB of RAM.

highlights.title: Smaller File Size
highlights.text: Compressed assets keep the reBrawl APK under 95 MB — perfect for devices with limited storage.

highlights.title: Feature-Packed
highlights.text: Despite the optimizations, all brawlers, gems, coins, and core game modes are fully unlocked and available from the start.

highlights.title: No Root Required
highlights.text: Standard APK installation. No root, no patches — just download reBrawl Legacy and start playing.

installSteps.title: Preparation
installSteps.text: Remove any existing reBrawl installations that may conflict with the reBrawl Legacy package name.

installSteps.title: Download
installSteps.text: Grab the verified reBrawl Legacy v28.189-lite APK from the download link below.

installSteps.title: Permissions
installSteps.text: Go to Settings → Security and enable "Unknown Sources" to allow the installation.

installSteps.title: Install
installSteps.text: Open the file and tap "Install". On older Android versions, you may need to use a file manager to locate the download.

faq.question: Will reBrawl Legacy work on my old phone?
faq.answer: If your device runs Android 4.3 or higher and has at least 1 GB of RAM, reBrawl Legacy should run great. It was specifically optimized for devices that can't handle modern Brawl Stars builds.

faq.question: Why does reBrawl Legacy look different from Classic?
faq.answer: reBrawl Legacy uses optimized textures, simplified particle effects, and lower-resolution UI elements to keep frame rates smooth on older hardware. The gameplay is still the same great experience.

faq.question: Does reBrawl Legacy have all the brawlers?
faq.answer: reBrawl Legacy includes the brawler roster from its base version (v28). Later brawlers require newer game engine features, but you still get a full roster of fan-favorite characters to play with.

timeline.title: Private Beta Launch
timeline.description: reBrawl opens to a select group of testers — offering unlimited gems, coins, and every brawler from day one. The Brawl Stars community discovers a fresh way to play.

timeline.title: Public Release
timeline.description: The server opens to all players worldwide. Within the first week, over 10,000 players join. Coverage spreads across gaming forums, subreddits, and YouTube channels. The active community grows fast.

timeline.title: Version 30 Major Update
timeline.description: reBrawl reaches parity with Brawl Stars v30 and introduces exclusive custom game modes and community-hosted tournament brackets you couldn't find anywhere else.

timeline.title: Peak Era — 500K Players
timeline.description: reBrawl reaches over 500,000 registered players. Weekly community events, custom map contests, and brawler showcases define the golden era of creative gameplay on private servers.

timeline.title: Official reBrawl Archive Goes Live
timeline.description: Every APK version becomes available through the Official reBrawl Archive — virus-scanned, SHA-256 verified, and ready to download. The community's favorite private server is always within reach.

whoWeAre.heading: Who We
whoWeAre.p1: Welcome to the Official reBrawl Archive. We're a team of dedicated Brawl Stars fans, mobile gaming enthusiasts, and long-time members of the reBrawl community.
whoWeAre.p2: Our mission is simple: to provide a safe, transparent, and feature-packed resource for players who want to explore everything reBrawl has to offer — from the chaotic custom content of reBrawl Mods to the smooth, optimized experience of reBrawl Legacy.

values.heading: Why We
values.subtitle: The reBrawl community deserves a trusted home for verified downloads, safe reBrawl APKs, and honest information about the Brawl Stars private server experience.

trust.heading: Why
trust.text: We are not the developers of reBrawl — we're an independent, community-driven project run by passionate Brawl Stars fans. By maintaining the Official reBrawl Archive, we make sure the incredible custom content, creative gameplay innovations, and community-driven features that the reBrawl team built are always accessible to players.
trust.boxText: Our guides are written based on real device testing (Android 4.3 through Android 14) and hands-on experience with every reBrawl edition. We believe in honest, clear information — not clickbait.

dmcaPage.heroSubtitle: The Official reBrawl Archive respects copyright and responds promptly to valid takedown requests under the DMCA.
dmcaPage.overviewText: We comply with U.S. DMCA requirements and review copyright claims for content hosted on this site. If you believe your work has been used without permission, submit a valid takedown request and we will respond as quickly as possible.
dmcaPage.processText: Send a DMCA notice to our team with the required information. A valid notice helps us process your request faster and keeps the archive compliant.
processItems: Your full legal name and contact information.
A description of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed.
The URL of the content you believe infringes your rights.
A statement that you have a good faith belief the use is unauthorized.
A statement made under penalty of perjury that the information in the notice is accurate.
dmcaPage.contactText: Send DMCA notices to contact@rebrawl.app with the subject line [DMCA].

privacyPolicyPage.heroSubtitle: We only collect the data needed to support downloads, provide customer support, and keep the archive secure.
privacyPolicyPage.overviewText: The Official reBrawl Archive is committed to protecting your privacy. We do not sell personal data, and we only use information to operate the site, respond to requests, and improve user experience.
collectionItems: Contact information you provide when you reach out or request support.
Technical data such as browser type, device, and usage patterns to help improve the site.
Cookies and analytics data to understand how visitors use the archive.
privacyPolicyPage.useText: We use data to respond to inquiries, protect the site from abuse, and make sure downloads work smoothly. We do not share personal details with third parties unless required by law.
privacyPolicyPage.rightsText: You can request access to data we hold about you or ask us to correct inaccurate information. For privacy requests, contact contact@rebrawl.app.

termsPage.heroSubtitle: By using the Official reBrawl Archive, you agree to these terms governing site use, downloads, and content disclaimers.
termsPage.overviewText: These terms explain how you may use the Official reBrawl Archive. All downloads are provided as-is, and you are responsible for complying with any applicable local laws when installing content.
termsPage.usageText: You may browse the archive, download APKs, and use the content for personal, non-commercial purposes. Do not misuse the site or attempt to bypass download protections.
termsPage.downloadsText: All APK downloads are provided for informational and archival purposes. You are responsible for verifying compatibility with your device and installing apps safely.
termsPage.disclaimerText: The Official reBrawl Archive is an independent project and is not affiliated with Supercell. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access, and we are not liable for any damage resulting from use of the site or downloaded files.
termsPage.changesText: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
